title: BERRY HOUSE - 211info
text: KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION BERRY HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an emergency short term shelter. Guests will have access to meals, showers, and clothing. 1931 Mission Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Women with children age 0-10. Prospective guests must be clean and sober before intake Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Email (541) 882-4895 0 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 882-4895 ext 0 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID card AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - 30-DAY DRUG-FREE SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION
